_readme: One entry per person. companies: list of board names from config.json, or ['all']. filters: optional per-user override — any key omitted falls back to the global filters in config.json; set a key to '' to disable that filter for this user. Delivery: discord_webhook (Server Settings > Integrations > Webhooks > New Webhook > Copy URL) and/or telegram_chat_id (create a bot with @BotFather, have the friend message it once, read chat id from api.telegram.org/bot<TOKEN>/getUpdates; export TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN on the server). mute: true disables a user without deleting them.
